## Use-case

_What problem are you trying to solve? Who is the user and what are they doing when this matters?_

## Proposed solution

_One concrete approach. If you have alternatives in mind, add them under "Alternatives" below._

## Which surface?

- [ ] Niya (VTuber / companion)
- [ ] Niya Tools (web at `/tools`)
- [ ] Niya Tools (Chrome extension)
- [ ] API layer
- [ ] Infra / DX
- [ ] Docs

_When is this considered done? One or two checkboxes is enough._

## Alternatives considered

_Other ways to solve this, and why the proposed one wins._

## Non-goals

_What this request is NOT trying to do — helps avoid scope creep._
